description_long: This bungalow features a single-story layout with a modern, open floor plan and multiple rooms visible through large windows and doors. The exterior walls are primarily white, complemented by gray and black accents on doors and window frames. A spacious backyard is enclosed by a light-colored fence, containing a patio area, a large tree, and a small shed or outbuilding. The roof is flat, with a transparent section over the patio, allowing natural light to filter into the outdoor living space. The front facade includes a main entrance with double doors and several windows, while the rear opens to the garden and patio area. The overall design emphasizes functionality, outdoor connectivity, and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with large windows, a flat roof, and a fenced backyard featuring a patio, tree, and small shed. The design highlights open living spaces and strong indoor-outdoor connections.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a glimpse into the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the bungalow, the backyard patio, and the shed at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the fenced backyard, patio area, large tree, and the small shed.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying the rear entrance, patio, and the arrangement of interior rooms.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
